chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A No.100 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objection For order on CMA No.1854/2024 For order on CMA No.1855/2025 For hearing of main case. 22.10.2025. None have been present in this case since the date of its institution on 18.03.2024. Meanwhile, this matter has been listed on at least four occasions, yet no intimation is received. It appears that the applicant has lost interest in this revision. The same is dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE Asif.I. Khan
